raw_title: Bringing People into the Story: How Virtual Reality Journalism Affects the Feeling of Presence
title_en: Bringing People into the Story: How Virtual Reality Journalism Affects the Feeling of Presence
title_zh: 将人们带入故事：虚拟现实新闻如何影响临场感
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了虚拟现实新闻如何影响人们的临场感，即感觉身临其境的程度。它关注虚拟现实技术如何改变人们体验新闻故事的方式。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how virtual reality journalism affects people's feeling of presence, or how immersed they feel in the story. It focuses on how VR technology changes the way people experience news stories.
research_direction_zh: 研究虚拟现实等新兴技术如何影响新闻传播和受众体验，探索沉浸式媒体对认知和情感的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating how emerging technologies like virtual reality impact journalism and audience experience, exploring the effects of immersive media on cognition and emotion.
